caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a matching green baseball cap with headphones speaks into a professional black microphone. His t-shirt features white text that reads "ION NEVEZ" above a larger, stylized "SUI". He is seated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and grey pants standing behind him. The background is filled with various framed photographs and racks of clothing. Two logos are visible on the screen: a circular "DRE" logo on the left and a red "DRE" logo with the text "TDT" on the right. Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expressions slightly as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain static.
